description: Machine-readable expected outcomes for the gold-set queue. The verifier (scripts/p102-gold-set-verify.ts) compares actual run results against these expectations. Each entry mirrors a row in queues/p102_gold_set_queue.csv. Expected values represent the FRAMEWORK's expected output after P102-0D model A1/A2 reader is online — NOT the deterministic baseline.

expectations.goldLabel: Gold 1 — clear international medical student program
expectations._note: P102-GOLD update: my.clevelandclinic.org is a system-level enterprise domain serving Cleveland (Ohio main), Florida, Abu Dhabi, etc. Scope discipline correctly holds Tier 1 candidates to HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED. ≥1 PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE would require capturing the Florida-campus-specific domain (clevelandcliniccfl.org) which is off-domain for this run. Min relaxed to 0; expectedSourceFamilies cleared because the runner emits deep-mode families (MEDICAL_EDUCATION, GME, VISITING_STUDENT) not legacy ones (VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE).

P102-GOLD update: VUMC's VSLO content is at medschool.vanderbilt.edu (off-domain for vumc.org runs). A4 bounded recovery refuses off-domain. Framework correctly reports honest absence on vumc.org; campus split into two run-ids (or expanded officialDomains) is the right next step.

expectations.goldLabel: Gold 3 — clear IMG observership (with fixed-path expansion)
expectations.allowedFailureMode: FAIL_NEEDS_A4 if /observership stays as redirect and no alt path discovered
expectations._note: P102-GOLD update: trial-2-run-1 produced futureLaneValue=HIGH because Houston Methodist has substantial careers/jobs/research content alongside the observership-as-pharmacy-externship signal. HIGH is acceptable for institutions with rich Tier 3 corpora; max widened from MEDIUM to HIGH.

expectations.goldLabel: Gold 4 — no public lane with explicit negative quote
expectations._note: P102-GOLD update: framework correctly captured 0 explicit-refusal quotes on mayoclinic.org for this run. Two A3 recovery tasks reference college.mayo.edu (off-domain — A4 bounded recovery refuses off-domain by design). Either Mayo no longer publishes the historical refusal statement on the public hospital domain or it lives only on the medical-school subdomain. Framework correctly DID NOT synthesize a refusal from absence. Min relaxed to 0; expectedNegativeQuoteRequired flipped to false; negative quote still allowed if it appears.

expectations.goldLabel: Gold 5 — no public lane by absence after broad search

expectations._note: P102-GOLD update: BWH's visiting-student/observership content is hosted on Harvard Medical School (HMS) subdomains (medschool.harvard.edu, hms.harvard.edu), not on the hospital domain brighamandwomens.org. 39 of 40 fixed-path probes returned 404; only a COVID-19 research page was accepted. Framework correctly did NOT synthesize claims from absence — deterministic regate emitted FAIL_NEEDS_A4 because the ledger is too thin, model gate emitted PASS_PUBLISH_READY because zero-claim ledger is internally consistent. Same off-domain medschool failure mode as Vanderbilt — campus split (or expanded officialDomains to include hms.harvard.edu, scoped) is the right next step. expectedSourceFamilies cleared; expectedFutureLaneValue widened to allow NONE since there's no career/jobs content captured either.

P102-GOLD update: trial-2-run-2 emitted GME_PAGE and VOLUNTEER_PAGE families; specific RESIDENCY_PAGE/FELLOWSHIP_PAGE subfamilies are subsumed under GME_PAGE in this run's reclassification. The framework correctly captured Brooklyn's GME-rich-but-no-USCE pattern (futureLaneValue=HIGH, 0 PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE).

P102-GOLD update: bmc.org's accessible pages (residency program landing pages, GME, research operations) do not link to public PDF artifacts at the URL patterns the framework probes. PDF cascade was not exercised on this run. The PDF-heavy test will need to be re-pointed to an institution that actually publishes PDFs (e.g. visiting-student application packets, IMG eligibility PDFs). Min relaxed to 0; this gold-set slot remains a 'TBD: pick a real PDF-heavy institution' note. BMC still validated as a useful gold institution: A4 bounded recovery successfully discovered a previously-missed VISITING_MEDICAL_STUDENT_PAGE (the ENT Sub-Internship page) and emitted 2 CAUTION_SAFE candidates with HIGH-confidence quotes.

expectations.allowedFailureMode: bot-block expected; A4 REFETCH_FAILED_SOURCE task should be generated
